description: Agentforce for Sales detail page — breadcrumb, hero with Sales cloud icon and progress badge, Turn On Agentforce section, Start with an Agent Template section containing Sales Coaching (expanded with steps) and SDR Agent (collapsed) toggles, resource links, and help videos

designContext.conversionNote:
SUPER CRITICAL: The generated React+Tailwind code MUST be converted to match the target project's technology stack and styling system.
1. Analyze the target codebase to identify: technology stack, styling approach, component patterns, and design tokens
2. Convert React syntax to the target framework/library
3. Transform all Tailwind classes to the target styling system while preserving exact visual design
4. Follow the project's existing patterns and conventions
DO NOT install any Tailwind as a dependency unless the user instructs you to do so.
designContext.styles: Text/Link: #0B5CAB, Text / Default: #181818, Icon / Default: #747474, 04 - Section Subtitle / Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, lineHeight: 21, letterSpacing: 0), 11 - Uncategorized / Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 42, weight: 400, lineHeight: 42, letterSpacing: 0), 03 - Body/Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 13, weight: 400, lineHeight: 20, letterSpacing: 0), 02 - Label / Bold: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Bold, size: 12, weight: 700, lineHeight: 18, letterSpacing: 0), Foundation/Gray/Neutral-100: #FFFFFF, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-80: #C9C9C9, Text / White: #FFFFFF, Text / Weak: #444444, Constant/White: #FFFFFF, Icon/White: #FFFFFF, Foundation/Blue/Blue-50: #0176D3, 01 - Footnote/Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 10, weight: 400, lineHeight: 16, letterSpacing: 0), Text / Success: #2E844A, Icon / Brand: #0176D3, 05 - Section Title / Bold: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Bold, size: 16, weight: 700, lineHeight: 24, letterSpacing: 0), Blue - 20: #032D60, Foundation/Blue/Blue-40: #0B5CAB, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-70: #AEAEAE, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-95: #F3F3F3
